Issues with the Bot?

It's common for the ai to take control of the conversation, and often speak for the user. It's an even more prominent nuisance in multi-personality bots. It's an unsolvable issue that I don't have control of. To try and prevent it, add more detail to your responses and avoid making them short. Thank you 💕
